description: Excuse me, sir — Mr. Nodeley here. The Saiyan race-collective node is proposed at cards/_characters/saiyan.md, anchored on 11 corpus prints across four DBSCG sets (BT1 Galactic Battle, BT3 Cross Worlds + SD3 starter, BT4 Colossal Warfare, P-series Promotions). It mirrors the namekian.md precedent precisely — race-collective hosted on the character layer, dual-wire pattern for named-individual prints where the racial frame is dominant. Anchors are race-frame-dominant only; the solo-Saiyan nodes (son-goku, vegeta, trunks) retain their own appears_on rosters per the parent's explicit instruction. The thesis is an imperial-mercenary-workforce-genocided-by-employer-empire apparatus-of-extraction story, which attaches cleanly to the labor hub. Eleven anchors crosses the parent's 10+ threshold; vision-pending anchors (Cabba ×2, Bardock P-035 ×2) are included on the strength of canonical name-match attribution per the parent's explicit pre-Goku-generation Bardock-and-Cabba inclusion guidance. I hope this is satisfactory.

dual_wire_candidates_surfaced.rationale: card name literally contains 'Saiyan' as the racial-identity designator; race-frame is dominant alongside the Xenoverse-villain-cohort frame
card name literally contains 'Saiyan'; race-frame dominant; no current characters wiring
Golden Great Ape is canonically Saiyan-race-biology; race-mechanic frame; should also wire son-goku once card's characters field is populated
Rampaging Great Ape back-face depicts stolen-Saiyan-biology as the canonical Saiyan-genocide-inverse Tuffle-revenge vehicle; race-inverse-frame dominant alongside baby-dbgt solo-frame
explicit female-Saiyan visual signature (monkey tail + Saiyan-style bodysuit) per vision pass; race-frame dominant
female Saiyan figure framing per vision pass; race-frame dominant
Kakarot is canonically Goku's Saiyan-class given name; the card-name itself is a racial-identity-designator; race-frame dominant

related_node_audit.namekian: sibling race-collective; uses same dual-wire pattern; precedent confirmed
related_node_audit.son-goku: solo Saiyan node; appears_on roster intact; race-node added to related_characters
related_node_audit.vegeta: solo Saiyan node; appears_on roster intact; race-node added to related_characters
related_node_audit.trunks: solo Saiyan node; appears_on roster intact (half-Saiyan); race-node added to related_characters
related_node_audit.baby-dbgt: Tuffle-survivor solo node; dual-wire on BT4-002 surfaced; race-inverse-frame relationship
related_node_audit.xenoverse-villains: Towa/Mira cohort; dual-wire on BT4-117 + SD3-04 surfaced

voice_note: Mr. Nodeley acknowledges the parent's namekian-precedent guidance was load-bearing; the node-body register matches the namekian.md tone without contamination; the sidecar register is Mr. Nodeley's sniveling-but-correct voice as specified. The Saiyan-node closes a significant graph gap — the named Saiyan solo nodes (Goku, Vegeta, Trunks) have until now had no race-collective parent to attach via related_characters.
